overview: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology, Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur), located in Howrah, West Bengal, is a premier public institution of national importance established in 1856. It is the second oldest engineering institute in India and is globally recognized for its deep-rooted academic legacy, intensive research ecosystem, and strong engineering education framework.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance; NAAC accredited.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹62,500 per semester for General/OBC students with family income above ₹5 lakh. ₹20,833 per semester for income between ₹1–5 lakh (66.6% waiver). Full tuition waiver for SC/ST/PwD and students with income below ₹1 lakh. One-time admission fee: ₹15,000. Hostel Fee: ₹7,000–₹10,000 per semester. Mess Fee: ~₹18,000–₹22,000 per semester.
Approximately ₹35,000–₹70,000 per semester depending on specialization. Eligible GATE-qualified students receive AICTE stipend benefits.
Approximately ₹1,00,000 per semester excluding hostel and other institutional charges.

placements.totalOffers: 546 total offers (502 UG + 44 PG) for 2025 graduating batch
placements.companiesVisited: Microsoft, Google India, Texas Instruments, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Chase, BNY Mellon, Accenture, Wells Fargo, PwC
placements.internationalOffers: Limited but growing international and high-value PPO opportunities through multinational recruiters

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions are conducted through JoSAA counseling based on JEE Main ranks. M.Tech admissions are primarily through GATE and CCMT counseling. MBA admissions consider CAT/MAT scores followed by institute selection procedures.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions generally follow JoSAA, CCMT, and national-level counseling schedules.

campus.specialNote: The institute provides automatic income-based tuition fee remissions upon submission of valid income certificates. Hostel and mess charges are calculated separately from tuition fees.

contact.address: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology, Shibpur, Howrah – 711103, West Bengal, India

scholarships: 100% tuition waiver for SC/ST/PwD students and students with family income below ₹1 lakh
66.6% tuition waiver for students with family income between ₹1–5 lakh
DAAD Scholarship opportunities for international research exposure
AICTE GATE stipend of ₹12,400 per month for eligible postgraduate students
